success.description: You smash through the target's defences and strike for +1 damage, +1 critical
You hit for +1 damage, +2 critical, and +1 damage per ally sacrificed to this attack

chaosStar.description: Terrified they might be next, a number of henchmen equal to the number of henchmen just sacrificed turn tail and flee

challenge.description: Special: You methodically sacrifice lesser minions to set up the target for a final, crippling blow. Each ally you sacrifice is automatically killed, but reduces the difficulty modifier of this attack by . Each henchman ally sacrificed instead adds to the dice pool

success.description: The brutish orc carves through the engagement, heedless of friend or foe. The attack inflicts +2 damage, +1 critical
As above, +1 damage for each goblin or snotting killed to empower this attack
As above, +1 damage for each goblin or snotling killed to empower this attack

chaosStar.description: All greenskins in the engagement suffer 1 wound

challenge.description: Special: The GM may choose to kill any number of snotlings or goblins in the current engagement as the orc hacks through it. For each goblin killed, reduce the difficulty modifier by . For each snotling killed, add to the attack check
